meaning: n.致醉的饮料,烈酒vt.不断喝vi.饮烈酒
examples: My favourite tipple is a glass of port.
His favourite tipple was rum and lemon.
However, this way of identifying the right tipple turned out to be rather tedious.
After the meal, a bottle of the local tipple, hierbas, is brought to the table.
The bottle of ancient tipple was purchased from the Antique Wine Company in London.
